string.description: Text value used for service names, image tags, commands and configurations

integer.description: Whole number value used for port numbers, replica counts and memory limits

boolean.description: Logical value used for boolean options like privileged, tty, stdin_open

mapping.description: YAML dictionary of key-value pairs used for environment variables, labels, and build args

sequence.description: YAML list of values used for ports, volumes, depends_on and command arrays

duration.description: Time duration with units for healthcheck intervals, timeouts and stop_grace_period

byte_value.description: Memory size with units for mem_limit, memswap_limit, shm_size constraints
